title: Rectify and touch up vehicle direct gloss paint faults using two-pack systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Rectify and touch up vehicle direct gloss paint faults using two-pack systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Determine paint fault, its cause and rectification requirements

pcs.text: Identify cause of paint fault from available information2.2 Inspect visually inspect faulty paintwork and determine extent of damage and areas requiring rectification2.3 Assess damage to paintwork from visual comparison with undamaged paintwork2.4 Identify requirements for fault rectification according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify cause of paint fault from available information2.2 Inspect visually inspect faulty paintwork and determine extent of damage and areas requiring rectification2.3 Assess damage to paintwork from visual comparison with undamaged paintwork2.4 Identify requirements for fault rectification according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify cause of paint fault from available information2.2 Inspect visually inspect faulty paintwork and determine extent of damage and areas requiring rectification2.3 Assess damage to paintwork from visual comparison with undamaged paintwork2.4 Identify requirements for fault rectification according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine paint fault, its cause and rectification requirements

elements.title: Rectify and touch up paint fault

pcs.text: Identify materials required to restore paintwork to pre-damage condition according to paint manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.2 Measure, mix and apply materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Rectify damaged paintwork and blend with existing paintwork using direct gloss two-pack system and approved blending and drying techniques3.4 Complete rectification processes according to workplace procedures and manufacturers specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify materials required to restore paintwork to pre-damage condition according to paint manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.2 Measure, mix and apply materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Rectify damaged paintwork and blend with existing paintwork using direct gloss two-pack system and approved blending and drying techniques3.4 Complete rectification processes according to workplace procedures and manufacturers specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify materials required to restore paintwork to pre-damage condition according to paint manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.2 Measure, mix and apply materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Rectify damaged paintwork and blend with existing paintwork using direct gloss two-pack system and approved blending and drying techniques3.4 Complete rectification processes according to workplace procedures and manufacturers specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Rectify and touch up paint fault

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes
